Class GTNetEntityPublicDTO

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.m2m.model.GTNetEntityPublicDTO
public class GTNetEntityPublicDTO extends Object
Public DTO for GTNetEntity used in M2M communication. Excludes gtNetConfigEntity which contains local exchange configuration.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GTNetEntityPublicDTO()
     
    GTNetEntityPublicDTO(GTNetEntity entity)
    Creates a public DTO from a GTNetEntity, excluding sensitive configuration.

      public boolean isAccepting()
      Checks if this entity accepts incoming data requests.
      Returns:
      true if acceptRequest is AC_OPEN or AC_PUSH_OPEN
